title: Lacrimis
description: The tears that fall from Crying Obsidian are magical
body:
### The tears that fall from crying obsidian have a surprising amount of magical power.

#### Requires Fabric API and Patchouli

To start, a guide for these powers can be found by using a book on the block in question. From there, line a caldron with gold and do some experiments. This guide book, the ingame recipe book, and many advancements are arranged to lead you forwards.

#### [Tutorial Video](https://youtu.be/aqXr296JE5E)

Create large rune arrays that can teleport, move blocks, and edit mob spawners.
Build invulnerable walls out of magical power.
Discover a new way to defy death, and the unique benefits it brings.
All from the tears that collect in a crucible.
